fields.description: generate-test-index.sh's _broader_scan_find_tests() function runs find "$repo_root" (full repo scan) for every source file passed to it. The outer loop iterates over all source files (n), and the inner find+grep scan iterates over all test files in the repo (m), making the total complexity O(n*m). On repos with many source files and many test files this becomes extremely slow — the script times out or takes minutes to complete. The fix should cache the repo-wide test file list once before the loop and reuse it for each source file lookup.
